name: python-eduground
description: Interactive, solution-free Python learning path with browser execution.

scripts.validate:release: npm run validate && npm run validate:integration && npm audit --audit-level=high --ignore-scripts
scripts.validate: node --check course-app.js && node --check theme-bootstrap.js && node --check dashboard-model.js && node --check dashboard-view.js && node --check learning-content.js && node --check learning-toolbox.js && node --check learning-clinics.js && node --check concept-clinic.js && node --check class-materials.js && node --check class-page.js && node --check rounding-model.js && node --check rounding-lab.js && node --check assessment-data.js && node --check assessment-engine.js && node --check assessment-room.js && node --check audio-feedback.js && node scripts/validate-test-data.mjs && node scripts/validate-starter-data.mjs && node scripts/validate-learning-content.mjs && node scripts/validate-assessment-data.mjs && npm run validate:backend && npm run validate:security
